items.text:
🎬 **UPGRADE YOUR SHOWREEL: Cinematic Scenes for Actors**

Struggling to get that "Pro" look with your showreel? We are filmmakers looking to collaborate with dedicated actors to create high-end, bespoke showreel scenes.

We shoot on the **Sony A7iii** with **Sirui Nightwalker** cine lenses (T1.2) to give you that shallow depth-of-field and "big screen" bokeh you see on Netflix Whether you need a gritty East London crime drama, a subtle *True Detective* noir, or a high-stakes CEO monologue, we handle the lighting, sound, and edit to make you look like a lead.

**What we offer:**
* **Custom Scripts:** Written specifically for your casting type.
* **Professional Scenes:** Shot to look like a film or TV. We offer a wealth of experience having made feature films from 10+ years in the business.
* **4K Film & Colour:** Cinematic "Film Look" included.
* **Fast Turnaround:** Get your clips ready for Spotlight/Mandy.
* **Professional Actors:** We offer a professional actor to act opposite you in a scene to make it stand out even more.

📍 Based in **London/Essex**. Check out my latest scenes below! 👇

https://www.instagram.com/sticksreels/

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — ATLANTA 🎬
Project Title: Glass Crown: The Repass
Type: Narrative Short Film (Festival Submission)
Location: Atlanta, GA
Shoot Dates: Shoot Dates: Mid May – Early June (exact dates TBD based on cast availability)
Compensation: Unpaid (IMDb credit, footage for reel, meals provided)
PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
A powerful, character-driven short film centered on family, status, and survival.
Set during a tense repast, long-buried dynamics erupt into a moment that changes everything.
This piece will be submitted to film festivals, including the Atlanta Film Festival.
CASTING ROLES:
SIENNA (Lead, Black, early 30s)
Poised, controlled, commanding. A woman who has built herself from nothing—now forced to face the family she left behind.
CAIRO (Lead, Black, early–mid 30s)
Quietly dominant. Protective, grounded, dangerous when pushed. Speaks less, carries more.
COCO (Supporting, Black, 40s–50s)
Warm but sharp. A protector, a second mother figure. Sees everything.
JONATHAN (Supporting, Black, 40s–50s)
Unpredictable, volatile, intimidating. Carries the weight of years and bad decisions.
QUAN (Supporting, Black, early 20s)
Young, reckless, trying to prove himself. Emulates the wrong influence.
ATHENA (Supporting, Black, Female, age 6)
Quiet strength. Observant, emotionally intelligent beyond her years.
ARTEMIS (Supporting, Black, Male, age 6)
Confident, expressive, protective of his sister.
DAY PLAYER ROLES (1–3 lines):
• Cousin Denise (30s–40s, sharp, judgmental)
• Older Woman (50s–70s)
• Teen Girl / Teen Boy
• Dope Boy
• Little Cousin (child)
EXTRAS:
Family members, neighbors, background roles for repast + exterior block scene.
TO SUBMIT:
Send to: LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 
Include:
• Name
• Age
• Headshot (or clear photo)
• Location (Atlanta/local preferred)
• Acting reel (if available, not required)
NOTE:
This is a passion-driven, cinematic project focused on performance, emotion, and storytelling.
Looking for actors who can bring depth, presence, and authenticity to the screen.
Let’s build something powerful. 🎬

items.text:
Casting Call 
Project Title: MIDNIGHT Production Type: 

Independent Short Film Filming Dates: Beginning early August.

Location: New Milford, CT

We are currently seeking a talented Afro-Latina actress for a leading role in an upcoming independent short film.

Role Requirements:
* Female, Afro-Latina
* Ages 19–26
* Height between 5’0” and 5’5”
* Must be local to the filming area
* Strong emotional range and ability to convey internal conflict through subtle, nonverbal performance

Project Details:
This is an unpaid opportunity however we will provide:
* On-set meals
* Transportation assistance if needed
* Professional footage for your reel
* A collaborative and supportive creative environment

Filming is scheduled to begin in early August, with exact dates to be confirmed.
We are looking for a dedicated performer who is passionate about storytelling and committed to bringing depth and authenticity to the role.

To Submit: Jonathan.tank59@gmail.com Please send your headshot, resume (if available) and a brief introduction and Include “Casting Submission (Your Name)” in the subject line.

items.text:
POTNIA THERON de Hélia Correia

DIA MUNDIAL DO TEATRO

27 MARÇO
Sexta- feira às 21h30

CINE-TEATRO SÃO JOÃO, PALMELA

info e reservas
Bilheteira do Cine-Teatro São João e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/173353-potnia_theron-cine_teatro_s_joao/

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um fôlego, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES

cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS

assistência de encenação BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO
assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO da TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal 

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

**Βάκχες – Από τη σκηνή της εκπαίδευσης στη σκηνή της παράστασης**

Με αφορμή τις «Βάκχες» του Ευριπίδη, ο σπουδαίος και βραβευμένος ηθοποιός Μάνος Βακούσης έρχεται για 8 μόνο συναντήσεις στον πολυχώρο +αίσθημα, στο Μοναστηράκι.

Ένα βιωματικό σεμινάριο θεάτρου βασισμένο στο σπουδαίο έργο «Βάκχες», όπου θα δουλέψουμε:
υποκριτική, αυτοσχεδιασμό, δημιουργία χαρακτήρα, κίνηση και σκηνική παρουσία.

Μια διαδρομή από τη σκηνή της εκπαίδευσης στη σκηνή της παράστασης.

Θα τηρηθεί αυστηρά σειρά προτεραιότητας.

Πληροφορίες / Κρατήσεις:
693 329 3229

items.text:
LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

Taught by professionals working in the industry - JUST £20

I hope this is OK to post here.

VRASP is coming to London and we are SO ready for you.

Starting Wednesday 29th April, our weekly drop in screen acting class lands back in Brixton (Brixton Road Youth Centre, 143-145 Brixton Road, London, SW9 6LZ).

Whether you are completely new to acting or a seasoned performer ready to level up, this class is for you. All abilities welcome, ages 18 and over. No commitment, just book online and show up.

At VRASP you are taught by working industry professionals, including founder Verona Rose, actress, writer, and presenter with credits including Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush to name a few.

As a VRASP student you can access:

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training.
 
VIP networking events with industry insiders 

Red carpet and industry events alongside Verona and the VRASP community 

The opportunity to join the VRASP talent agency as a natural next step in your career

Every Wednesday from 29th April 7pm to 9pm Brixton Road Youth Centre, London Just £20 per session

Book at www.vrasp.co.uk or drop us a message if you have any questions.

items.summary:
LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

Taught by professionals working in the industry - JUST £20

I hope this is OK to post here.

VRASP is coming to London and we are SO ready for you.

Starting Wednesday 29th April, our weekly drop in screen acting class lands back in Brixton (Brixton Road Youth Centre, 143-145 Brixton Road, London, SW9 6LZ).

Whether you are completely new to acting or a seasoned performer ready to level up, this class is for you. All abilities welcome, ages 18 and over. No commitment, just book online and show up.

At VRASP you are taught by working industry professionals, including founder Verona Rose, actress, writer, and presenter with credits including Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush to name a few.

As a VRASP student you can access:

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training.
 
VIP networking events with industry insiders 

Red carpet and industry events alongside Verona and the VRASP community 

The opportunity to join the VRASP talent agency as a natural next step in your career

Every Wednesday from 29th April 7pm to 9pm Brixton Road Youth Centre, London Just £20 per session

Book at www.vrasp.co.uk or drop us a message if you have any questions.
items.title: LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

items.text:
CASTING CALL: *The Classic Frenemy* (4 min Drama)

Simon Fraser University Surrey Campus 
| 250 - 13450 -102 Avenue
 

Shooting Date: 

March 19th (Thu) 3:00 PM-7PM (flexible shifts ok) 

Meeting Location:  

- Third floor, opposite the library when exiting the elevator — in the seating area behind the partition wall that includes the microwave and handwashing station.

Filming Location Note:  

- Filming will primarily take place in the third-floor hallway opposite the library (from the elevator direction) and in the seating area behind the partition wall with the microwave and handwashing station. A portion of the scene will also be filmed on the second floor, in the main seating and table area.

Compensation: 

- Digital copy
- Credit 
- Reel footage

Logline: 

- When a meticulous clever student   named Character 1 catches her jealous classmate Character 2 sabotaging her assignments, she sets a clever trap to expose and get revenge.

CASTING 2 Female Actors (18+, college age):  

Character 1: A committed student who consistently get A’s.   

Character 2: A student who is jealous of Character 1 since she believes getting an A is impossible. 

Supplies (Please bring if you have it; we'll provide otherwise):

- Bring either a binder or notebook with written notes 

-2 fake quiz sheets with one marked in A and one in B. It can either be a quiz with questions with grades drawn on it or two pieces of quiz report with those grade written on it. E.g without questions but rather a large title indicating Quiz 1 and in the bottom of the title it says grade:———. *But keeping it simple works.

- Laptop with Google Classroom open

Costume Required: 

- Completely opposite-colored outfits (including sleeves) — e.g., one wearing green/ one wearing red, blue/pink — to give a very clear picture on which character is which between the two characters. 

- Please bring glasses if you are Character 1 (your own or decorative/fake pair)

Project Members: Susan Song, Ben Liu, Ben Park

Post Sent By Susan Song 

Contact: 

- 778-723-9578

- ssa705@sfu.ca

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April.

Sophia/Soni (22-35) Strong and confident, sassy, eloquent, bold, and can be impulsive. **Any ethnicity.** She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April.

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. **Any ethnicity**. Shoot on 12th April.

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Girlfriend- 23-35, Any ethnicity.

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April.

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

topComments.text: I sent an email. Looking forward to hearing back.
Are u accepting resumes from people with no acting experience ?

items.text:
Dzień dobry!

Do filmu realizowanego przez studentów PWSFTVIT w Łodzi poszukujemy aktora dziecięcego - chłopca w wieku 8-10 lat.

Termin i miejsce zdjęć:
31.03-02.04.2026, Łódź

O projekcie:
Film opowiada o wrażliwym chłopcu, który w szkole przypominającej więzienie stopniowo zostaje wykluczony z grupy. Uczy się znosić wszystko w milczeniu, odnajdując kruche schronienie w wyjątkowej więzi, którą buduje ze swoim kanarkiem.

W związku z udziałem dziecka w produkcji wymagane będą następujące dokumenty: zgoda dyrektora szkoły, opinia pedagoga-psychologa oraz opinia lekarza rodzinnego.

W razie zainteresowania chętnie przekażę więcej szczegółów.

items.text:
🎥 Praca przy koncertach – szukam operatora video (Kraków)
# Rozwijam projekt realizacji koncertów LIVE (audio + video) i szukam osoby do współpracy — **tylko z Krakowa**.
## 👉 **Jeśli dopiero zaczynasz, ale czujesz klimat video i muzyki — to ogłoszenie jest dla Ciebie.**

🎯 Kogo szukam:

Osoby do pracy przy nagraniach koncertów —
**nie musisz mieć dużego doświadczenia**, ważniejsze jest:
* zaangażowanie
* chęć nauki
* podstawowe ogarnięcie sprzętu

📍 Lokalizacja:

Kraków (nagrania głównie w studio)

🎥 Zakres pracy:
* nagrywanie koncertów (6** kamer – cały sprzęt zapewniam**)
* ujęcia backstage / detale muzyków
* pomoc przy ustawieniu sprzętu
* obsługa miksera **Blackmagic ATEM**

👥 Jak pracujemy:
* mały, konkretny skład: **3 osoby – Ty, ja i realizator dźwięku**
* pracujesz blisko całego procesu i realnie się uczysz

🎹 Co oferuję:
* pracę przy prawdziwych koncertach (**1 razy w tygodniu, sobota**)
* dostęp do sprzętu i workflow koncertowego
* luźną, normalną współpracę (bez spiny)

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I have some experience working in film production and I’m looking to get more involved in new projects and collaborations. I’m especially interested in growing as a producer, but I’m also very open to working as a production assistant or supporting roles on set or development.

My background is in acting, with both a Bachelor’s and a Master’s degree, which gives me a strong connection to storytelling and working with performers.

I’d love to be part of a collective or join projects where I can collaborate, learn, and contribute. I’m particularly interested in opportunities in Europe and South America, but I’m also open to remote/online work.

If you’re working on something or know of any opportunities, feel free to reach out! 🎬

items.text:
Casting Call (Black Male 40-60) *PAID*
Hello to whomever reading, I am a film student and working on a class project called Bring the Beat Back. This project would be based in LA specifically the San Fernando valley. It would be a paid gig that would be shot on the 26th, 27th, and 28th of this month. See more info about the film on the flier. We are looking for someone to play the protagonist Barry, a now washed up rapper who was big in the 80s but has lost his flow since then.

 Also if you're interested in the role of Jay as described on the poster feel free to hit me up as well.

For any questions or if interested about the role please email me at jbf.film@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING CALL CSUN Short Film: BRING THE BEAT BACK Once a pioneer of hip hop and part of lengendary 80s duo, rapper Barry Fresh has lost his iconic flow. When offered a last chance to reclaim his former glory, he struggles to find balance between his musical obsession and his relationship with his nephew. Requirements JAY (18-24), BLACK MALE Jay, Barry's nephew, has great admiration for his uncle and besides helping him out also has dreams of chasing his own hip hop career. OHT: jbf. film@gmail com @bringthebeatbackfilm ဝ'

Opłata – 50 zł
Nagranie odbędzie się dziś i jutro (18–19 marca).

Proszę zgłaszać się pod numerem: +48 790 805 669
Najlepiej od razu przesłać zdjęcia. Miłego wieczoru!
items.title: Witam serdecznie 🙂

items.text:
Do dużej roli w odcinku Ukrytej Prawdy poszukujemy Pani w wieku 44-52 lata (koniecznie z  Doświadczeniem aktorskim)! 

Opis: Anna Kałuzińska (48), mama Leny, partnerka Kamila, pracuje w biurze
wygląd/ strój/ charakter: zwykła kobieta, sympatyczna, miła. Rozwódka, od niedawna związana z młodszym o dwa lata Kamilem. Po nieudanym małżeństwie zakochała się w Kamilu i jest szczęśliwa, że jej córka dobrze się z nim dogaduje. Jest w konflikcie z siostrą, która ma jej za złe, że Anna otrzymała darowiznę od rodziców w zamian za opiekę nad chorą mamą, co uszczupliło przyszłą masę spadkową. Ta sytuacja boli ją i wolałaby żyć z siostrą w zgodzie, nie pojmuje, dlaczego Renata tak bardzo się zmieniła i myśli tylko o pieniądzach.

Terminy: 3 dni, 23,24,25.03(poniedziałek, wtorek, środa) 

Stawka: 2000 zł za całość płatne przelewem

Zgłoszenia prosimy kierować na mail: casting@constantin-entertainment.pl 

W zgłoszeniu koniecznie: 
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, miasto zamieszkania, demo, opis doświadczenia aktorskiego, aktualne zdjecia.

items.text:
Join us at our next Actor’s Salon on Friday May 22nd from 6:30pm - 10pm at October Gallery in London 🎭🎉

Click the link below for £5 TICKETS and more information 👩🏻‍💻

[https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/events/theactorssalonmay26](https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/events/theactorssalonmay26)

Demidov Studio London presents: The Actor’s Salon

A meeting place for creative artists to share their work, connect with community and celebrate creativity.

Inspired by the great literary and theatrical Salons of the past, where actors, writers and visionaries gathered to share their work in an intimate setting, The Actor’s Salon is a space for artists to present their work – or work in progress – in a supportive, non-judgemental setting.

Whether you are an actor wanting to test out a monologue or an audition piece, a scene or a song, a writer wanting to try out an idea with actors, or other creative artist with an urge to bring life to an idea in front of a receptive audience, we have created this space for you.

In true Demidov spirit, it’s all about process, not result; away from the pressures of auditions, self tapes, rehearsals and the loneliness of one’s home studio. A place to connect where the artist in us is nurtured and perhaps collaborations are formed.

Come share your work and/or a drink with us!

NEXT SALON

Friday May 22nd from 6:30pm - 10pm
October Gallery, 24 Old Gloucester Street, London WC1N 3AL

EVENT INFORMATION

Our Actor’s Salon continues to be a space where artists can come together to share work, connect, and support one another. For our next Salon on 22nd May, we’ll be introducing a small £5 ticket.

This contribution helps us continue hosting the salon and maintaining a supportive environment for all creatives. We’ve kept the price as low as possible, and every ticket goes directly toward covering the costs of running the event.

Thank you for supporting the salon and helping us keep this creative community going.

Tickets are non-refundable.

Drinks will be available for purchase at this event.

All are welcome!

@octobergallerylondon

~
Demidov Studio London
The UK’s only certified Demidov Acting School
[www.demidovstudiolondon.com](https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com)

items.text:
Most actors warm up their voice. Very few actually train it.
There's a difference — and it shows.
Your tongue, lips, and teeth are muscles. They need daily work to build the neural connections that give you real clarity and presence on stage, on camera, and in the audition room.
This is the exercise I come back to every single day. Do it until you feel the tingle. That's how you know it's working.

!!!!!The link to the full lesson is in the comments!!!!!

🎭 Follow The Acting Academy for more practical tips from someone who's been there.
items.title: Your Body Is Your Instrument: The ONLY Vocal Exercises Actors Need

message.text:
Wow💥😮 I’m truly amazed by the strength and grace of Shen Yun’s male dancers — their legs and arms are pure power in motion!

⚡️ Don’t miss the chance to witness this magical and mesmerizing live experience.

🎟️ Visit: https://1kb.link/9e4lV8 for theater info and tickets! 🎟️

items.text:
Stop just “singing” the song. Start booking the room! 🎭🔥

Hey Folks!
I’m officially reopening my coaching books for a select number of artists worldwide 
📍Online Globally & Montreal

This isn’t your average vocal lesson. 
As an original Canadian cast member of SIX (Jane Seymour), recently in We Will Rock You (Killer Queen), and a current Producer & Casting Director, I coach from both sides of the table.

We’ll bridge the gap between technique and industry-ready performance: 
✨ The Casting Lens: Audition prep from the “other side.” 
✨ Pop/Rock Mastery: High-level technical edge.         
✨ Strategic Rep: A book that actually fits your brand.
✨ Storytelling: Making every lyric land.

Whether you’re prepping for a big audition or adding to your professional foundation; from Broadway shows to Cruise and Resort productions —We’ll cater every session to your career goals. 

Ready to get to work? 🎤✨

Slide through the photos for testimonials from my industry clients. ➡️

DM “VOICE” for my full rate card and available slots.

#VocalCoach #MusicalTheatre #SixTheMusical #AuditionPrep #OnlineCoaching

items.text:
‼️ CASTING CALL ‼️

My name is Alisiia, I’m a producer based in Warsaw ✨

I’m looking for a male actor / charismatic guy to film TikTok videos 👥

Age: 20-35
English level: C1, preferably without an accent.
💸Paid
📍Warsaw, Poland 

Type:
-athletic build
-active
-enjoy sports and physical activities

The guys will participate in various challenges and experiments, both sports-related and comedic. 💪

English:
-good conversational level
-preferably native or close to native

Skills:
-strong communication skills
-confidence in front of the camera
-ability to participate in dialogue-based and reaction videos

If you’re interested, please send me a direct message!📨

items.text:
‼️ CASTING CALL ‼️

My name is Alisiia, I’m a producer based in Warsaw ✨

I’m looking for a male actor / charismatic guy (STUNTMAN) to film TikTok videos 👥

Age: 20-35
Good english
💸Paid
📍Warsaw, Poland 

Type:
-more action-oriented

The guys will participate in various challenges and experiments, both sports-related and comedic 💪

Skills:
-stunt skills or similar experience are preferred
-no fear of heights
-willingness to participate in extreme or physically demanding scenes

Example of a possible scene:
-performing a slam dunk into a basketball hoop from a height (for example, from a helicopter) or taking part in other unusual sports experiments.

If you’re interested, please send me a direct message!📨

Dzień dobry Warszawo 😊

14.03 ( sobota) 

Doszukujemy😉

Do programu rozrywkowego poszukuje osób 18-40 lat. 

OSOBY KTÓRE JESZCZE U NAS NIE BYŁY.

Zdjecia 8:20- 12:30 
80 zł gotówką po planie. 

W tytule proszę wpisać   14.03

ZGŁOSZENIA PRZYJMUJE TYLKO NA MAILA I PEŁNE INFORMACJE!! 

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
-imię i nazwisko
- wiek
- numer telefonu
- zdjecia ( sylwetka i selfie) 
 adres mail: sharon@entris-art.pl

🎬Urgent call for an actress (18–early 20s) for a short horror shooting tomorrow.
Film: The Cracks in Bones

Film Location: Chesterfield

Time: 12:30–8:00pm 14th Mar

I realise it’s very short notice as the original actress had to drop out last minute. If anyone knows someone suitable, please contact lilyxcrosby@gmail.com.

Thanks a lot.

items.text:
Hello all, very short notice and id be surprised if anyone is available but were currently looking for extras to attend a scene of a gathering in a pub for an England match. This is for our big dissertation uni film. We are unfortunately on a tight budget but it would be much appreciated if anyone could attend.

Casting call on Wednesday the 18th, 8:00am at the The Bell, Bell Road in East Molesey

Please contact me for more details if available, thanks!

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unseren aktuellen Low Budget Spielfilm Fantasy/Horror suchen wir noch weibliche Darstellerinnen Rolle: Schöne junge Frauen (mit Dialog). Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, ab März 2026. Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, (bitte auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo euch), sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße und Schuhgröße an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an  Harlekin Filme Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
AUDITIONS FOR THE SULTAN OF SULU 

*We are seeking actors to be in our revival of George Ade's classic comic light opera. Actors of Central Asian and/or Filipino descent are encouraged to audition.*

The Sultan of Sulu, named Ki-Ram, along with his wife, concubines, and his Private Secretary Hadji, get tangled up in the Americans' efforts to bring "democracy" and "civilization" to Sulu, born from the dreaming mind of George Ade.

***Rehearsals***:

*April 4, April 11, May 2, June 20 at 6 Monteith Dr, Farmington, CT 06032 and May 9, May 16, May 23, May 30 at 281 Country Club Rd, Avon, CT 06001*

*Rehearsal Times: Rehearsal Times: 10:30pm to 2:30pm.*

*Performance Date: June 27 (1 pm.)*

*Performance Space: 6 Monteith Dr, Farmington, CT 06032.*

**Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided**

[https://forms.gle/9zJKQNpygPh4L7KRA](https://forms.gle/9zJKQNpygPh4L7KRA?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExTzdoaW1CUTZVWXVCYWFhWHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7-xhsEHfN4XYxX1O3oW215Ys-vatrK3XIbzoLoPKRCv4ErU3O3XgE6IXZu6Q_aem_jKf6dAMx6_-207GyqNJ0dg)

sharedPost.text: 🎭 Exciting News! 🎉 We are thrilled to announce open casting calls for our award-winning and internationally recognized theater production, “Sins of A Father: The Ministry,” on March 14, 2026, from 12 PM to 3 PM! Join us as we return to Houston, TX, where it all began 10 YEARS AGO! 🌟 Visit our website to explore the characters and register for auditions. Don’t miss your chance to be part of this incredible experience! 🌟 #SinsOfAFather #CastingCall #Theater

items.text:
“In rural England, a hearing impaired teenager is guided by a mysterious boy on a journey through forgotten places, each confronting him with the emotions of adolescence.”

We are looking for 2 actors as shown in the casting call, ideally for actors who are hearing impaired and or know sign language.

If interested, please contact lily with the contact details below.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL IN RURAL ENGLAND ,A HEARING-IMPAIRED TEENAGER IS GUIDED BY A MYSTERIOUS BOY ON A JOURNEY THROUGH FORGOTTEN PLACES, EACH CONFRONTING HIM WITH THE EMOTIONS OF ADOLESCENCE. ROLE:JOHN AGE:18-20 GENDER:MALE ROLE:WILLIAM AGE:18-20 GENDER:MALE NO PRIOR ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED FOOD AND DRINKS PROVIDED TRANSPORT COSTS COVERED FILMING IN & AROUND YORK/HALIFAX CTAT INFO: EMAIL:LITLY2OMARIE@GMAI.COM INSTAGRAM:LILY.MARIE.XOX'

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING: The project is called Easy Money. We have actors that have worked on Avatar: The Last Airbender, Fire Country, and Mulan to name a few. Our DOP has done camera work on The Good Doctor. This is an independently funded project, so the actors will not be paid. We are going through the union under ULB. Please DM me your headshot, demo reel, resume, and socials. Only potential candidates will be contacted. Actors will receive footage and IMDB credit. 

Ryan 
Age: 30-50
Gender: Male
Description:
He is a businessman. Think The Wolf of Wall Street. He does blow to keep his energy up throughout the day.

Helen
Age: 40-58
Gender:  Female
Description:
By day, she is a bus driver, and by night, she gets high on crack.

Alisha
Age: 25-35
Gender: Female
Description: She is a sex worker who does heroin. She offers a sexual favor to Alex in exchange for drugs.

Gurvinder
Age: 25-40
Gender: Male
Description:
We are looking for an East Indian or someone who can play that. He is from Surrey and was a former high school soccer player. He is an obnoxious character. Very arrogant. He likes to party hard on the weekends by drinking Crown and snorting coke with his homies.

topComments.text: wtf is this lol act like this and not get paid, you don't need actors just go to hastings you'll find them

CASTING 6 ROLES + BG (Coffee Brand Campaign)

Non-Union
Shoot Date: April 18 in Vancouver (Gastown area)

$1000 incl. 1 year buyout

items.text:
Hello everyone!

I'm producing a new online TV show, Lucid Dreams, and we’re on the hunt for some cast members! We’re looking for TWO security guards!

You need to be within TFL serving area (ideally London itself) to minimise travel times.

Date: 15/03
Time: 13:00 (filming to start at 13:30, so on time arrival is imperative)
Loc: NW10 6SJ (full address to be given upon casting for privacy reasons)
Pay: unpaid, but travel is reimbursed.

REQUIRED: The Security guards NEED to be taller than the lead, so you need to be taller than 6 foot. Below is the first episode, and Kevin is the lead.

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVZIiOaDGHy/?igsh=MWJyMGV6dWh5bGpqeg==

Please message me with a showreel/CV if you, or anyone you know, is interested, and I’ll pass it onto the director for discussion.

Thanks! 😊

sharedPost.text:
CASTING WARSZAWA – 23.03.2026

Kampania społeczna 1,5% dla Małych Braci Ubogich

Projekt pro bono (bez wynagrodzenia) – udział w ważnej kampanii społecznej.

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa, Bródno
📅 Zdjęcia: 23 marca 2026

Szukamy:

Nastolatki (3 osoby)
wiek 16–18 lat, dziewczyny i chłopcy.
Klimat fajnych dzieciaków z osiedla, które spotykają się na ławce / murku pod blokiem.
Jedna z osób (chłopak) powinna mieć swobodę aktorską.

Chłopiec (1 osoba)
wiek 10–12 lat.
Trochę rozrabiaka, charakterystyczny, zadziorny.
Duża lekkość w graniu emocji.

⸻

📩 Zgłoszenia:
impresariat.cametstudio@gmail.com

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do końca dzisiejszego dnia - 13.03.26 piątek 

Wybrane osoby otrzymają krótkie scenki do nagrania.
Prosimy o odesłanie nagrania w linku do prywatnego YouTube do:

⏰ 14 marca do godz. 12:00

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

# **🎬😂 CALLING ALL ACTORS & FILMMAKERS – READY FOR A WEEKEND OF LAUGHS; FILMS; NETWORKING & WORKSHOPS?**
# 
# The **Funny Life Film Festival** is back NEXT WEEKEND

📅 Friday 20th - Saturday 21st March 2026

📍 Collective Acting Studio, Islington, North London 

✨ Comedy Short Film Programmes
✨ Feature Film Premieres
✨ LIVE Stand-Up Comedy
✨ Filmmaker Q&As
✨ Industry workshop

Whether you love indie film, comedy, or just want a brilliant night out — this is for you.

🎟️ Tickets selling fast + Check-Out the FULL Programme → 

# www.thefunnylifefilmfestival.com/2026

👉 Tag a friend who needs a laugh.

 

 

See you there!!!

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.text:
**012  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy ojca głównej bohaterki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje mężczyzny do roli ojca głównej bohaterki. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miałby od **40 – 45 lat** o rudych włosach i bez zarostu, o określonych parametrach: **obwód w klatce 100- 105, obwód pasa 90/95 cm** i **wzrost: 175 -180** . Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Postać ta będzie nosić mundur polski podporucznika.Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Pojawi się też w retrospekcji bitwy w 1919 roku z Bolszewikami gdzie zostanie ranny w nogę. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem. Scenę wstępnie będziemy realizować na przełomie marca lub kwietnia.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
AKTORKA / TANCERKA GŁÓWNA ROLA W ETIUDZIE „TOMBÉ”
Do etiudy końcowo-rocznej na wydziale Reżyserii w AMA Film Academy poszukuję aktorki do głównej roli.

GATUNEK: Dramat psychologiczny 

TERMIN ZDJĘĆ: początek maja - 2 dni zdjęciowe.

LOKALIZACJA: Warszawa lub Starachowice

TYP PROJEKTU: Studencki / Non-profit (zapewniamy catering, zwrot kosztów za dojazd, profesjonalne materiały do portfolio/showreelu).

KOGO SZUKAMY? POSTAĆ: AGATA (gra wiek: 18-23 lata) Szukamy aktorki o drobnej, ale sprawnej fizycznie budowie ciała.

• Kluczowe wymagania: Doświadczenie w tańcu baletowym na poziomie pozwalającym na wiarygodne zaprezentowanie fragmentów układu na scenie.

• Profil emocjonalny: Rola wymaga dużego skupienia, operowania oszczędną ekspresją twarzy i pokazania skrajnego wysiłku fizycznego połączonego z wewnętrznym dramatem. (Brak dialogu)

O FILMIE: „Tombé” to historia o nieludzkiej determinacji. Agata stoi przed najważniejszym występem w karierze. Nikt nie wie, że kilka godzin wcześniej podjęła nieodwracalną decyzję, a teraz toczy walkę z własnym organizmem. To intymny portret ambicji silniejszej niż instynkt przetrwania. Inspiracje: Black Swan, Suspiria.

ZGŁOSZENIA: Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o przesłanie na adres: filmtombe@gmail.com

1. Aktorskiego self-tape’u 

2. Krótkiego nagrania prezentującego umiejętności baletowe.

3. Kilku zdjęć (twarz oraz sylwetka).

items.text:
Dzień dobry!

Do filmu realizowanego przez studentów PWSFTVIT w Łodzi poszukujemy aktora dziecięcego - chłopca w wieku 8-10 lat.

Termin i miejsce zdjęć:
31.03-02.04.2026, Łódź

O projekcie:
Film opowiada o wrażliwym chłopcu, który w szkole przypominającej więzienie stopniowo zostaje wykluczony z grupy. Uczy się znosić wszystko w milczeniu, odnajdując kruche schronienie w wyjątkowej więzi, którą buduje ze swoim kanarkiem.

W związku z udziałem dziecka w produkcji wymagane będą następujące dokumenty: zgoda dyrektora szkoły, opinia pedagoga-psychologa oraz opinia lekarza rodzinnego.

W razie zainteresowania chętnie przekażę więcej szczegółów.

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**serial fabularny – EPIZODY DZIECIĘCE**

Na wiosnę ruszamy z nowym serialem fabularnym, a do którego teraz szukamy **CHŁOPCÓW 6-8 LAT z doświadczeniem** **epizodycznym** na planach zdjęciowych.

Szukamy **blondynów w krótkich włosach** (ewentualnie zgoda na skrócenie). **Muszą grać w piłkę nożną.**

Chłopcy muszą płynnie mówić po polsku, bez akcentu.

Chętnie zobaczymy tu bliźniaków.

Stawki ustalane indywidualnie. Wybory należą do reżysera.

***Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć aktualną wizytówkę dziecka jako link do You Tube***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek dziecka, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'POD TYTUŁEM agencja castingowa CASTING DZIECIĘCY WARSZAWA NOWY SERIAL FABULARNY (WIOSNA 2026) POSZUKUJEMY CHŁOPCÓW 6-8 6- LAT 6-8 WIĘK 6-8 LAT + DOSWIADCZENIE EPIZODYCZNE PŁYNNY JĘZYK POLSKI (BEZ BEZAKCENTU) MILE WIDZIANI BLIZNIACY INSTRUKCJA ZGŁOSZENIA: WYŚLIJ NA ADRES: ewelina.wika@ podtytulem.pl TYTUŁ: w TREŚCI: Dane (imię/nazwisko dziecka rodzica wiek, miejscowość, wzrost) ZAŁĄCZ: ZDJECIA TWARZY SYLWETKIORAZ IORAZ LINK DO WIZYTÓWKI YOUTUBE szczegóły dotyczące zgłoszenia w treści postu'

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde, ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und beginne diesen September meine Ausbildung als Mediengestalter Bild/Ton an der Lazi Akademie in Esslingen. Allerdings habe ich vor schon jetzt anzufangen ein paar Kurzfilme zu drehen, und wollte in die Runde fragen wer Interesse hätte   kreative ideen mitzugestalten und villeicht sogar auch schon coole Ideen hat. Ich  suche auch eine Schauspielerin oder Sängerin die gut English lesen und sprechen kann um  eine paar  minutiges Sci-fi Video zu kommentieren, Schreibt mich gerne an. und ich werde alles detalliert erklären. Viele Grüße und hoffe sehen  uns bald am Filmset  😊
Edit: Ich wollte euch noch fragen ob jemand schon Equipment hat um bei Kurzfilmen mitzumachen, oder ob jemand Erfahrungen hat, wo man sich Equipment am besten ausleihen kann.

Hey Leute für unseren aktuellen Low Budget Spielfilm Fantasy/Horror suchen wir noch weibliche Darstellerinnen Rolle: Schöne junge Frauen (mit Dialog). Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, ab März 2026. Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, (bitte auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo euch), sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße und Schuhgröße an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an  Harlekin Filme Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – JOHANNESBURG / PRETORIA ACTORS 🎬
Hi everyone! I’m casting for a short-form comedy web series called Anomalies Anonymous.

👻 Anomalies Anonymous is a mockumentary-style comedy about supernatural beings attending a support group to deal with the challenges of living among humans.

The series follows characters like a fruitarian vampire, a vegan werewolf, a gorgon who struggles with eye contact, a dragon with anger issues, and a ghost who accidentally scares people.

📍 Details:

• Independent short-form comedy series

• Episodes approx. 1 minute long (for social media)

• Filming in Johannesburg / Pretoria

• Unpaid passion project

• Great opportunity for showreel footage and comedic material

🎭 Characters:

🧛 Popovici – vampire

🐺 Gregory – werewolf

🐍 Elena – gorgon

🐉 Iggy – dragon

👻 Sipho – ghost

👤 Daniel – invisible man (voice role)

📩 Interested?

Email me for the audition packet and sides:

caraleanespence17@gmail.com

Feel free to share with actors who might be interested!

✨ Looking forward to hearing from you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎불크 ANOMALIES ANONYMOUS Safe Space for theUnusual Unusual -Thursdays 7PM All Welcome CASTING CALL ANOMALIES ANONYMOUS Mockumentary Comedy Social Media Series NO JUDGMENT JUSTSUPPORT JUST SUPPORT TOFU BLOOD ORANGE احراه JUICE Pretoria / Johannesburg Multiple roles (20s-40s) Unpaid- Reel footage provided Self-tape auditions caraleanespence17@gmail.com @gmail.com Deadline: March 22, 2026 Audition packet available upon request‎'‎

items.text:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for real Construction Workers who are men, real Vehicle Drivers who are women, and real teenage Skateboarders for principal roles in a QT commercial! Details below:

Project: QuickTrip
NON-UNION
Casting Director: Vicky Boone, Chantel Italia
Audition date: Self tapes due 3/23
Callback Date: March 26, 2026 - virtual
Wardrobe Date: March 30, 2026
Shoot Dates: March 31 - April 3, 2026 (will work 1 day)
Rate of Pay: $750 +20%(session), $3000 + 20%(use), $100 +20%(fitting)
Location: Austin, TX. Must work local hire to ATX
Usage: Video and Print. All Media (all moving media + all print media). North America (US + CANADA + MEXICO). Exclusivity for C-Stores + QSRs 1 Year from first airdate.

—
WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

[REAL CONSTRUCTION WORKERS] 20-55 year old male, any ethnicity. Genuine and natural, not polished. Should feel like a friend, co-worker or neighbor. Expressive with a confident and grounded presence. Real construction workers or "blue-collar" workers encouraged to submit. OCP.

[REAL WOMEN WHO DRIVE FOR A LIVING] 25-45 year old woman, any ethnicity. Should be genuine and natural, not polished or “model-like.” Should feel like a friend, co-worker or neighbor. Expressive with a confident and grounded presence. Women who really drive for UPS, AMAZON, etc or other "blue-collar" workers encouraged to submit. OCP.

[SKATERS] 15-19 years old, male or female, any ethnicity. Must be a strong skateboarder. Genuine and natural, not polished or “model-like.” OCP.

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:
*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned (3/26, 3/30-4/3) or list conflicts
*FOR SKATER ONLY - Tell us a bit about your skateboarding experience.
*Please use the subject line "CONSTRUCTION WORKER" or "FEMALE DRIVER" or "SKATER" depending on which role you are submitting for.

We look forward to your submissions!
Team VBC

items.summary:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for real Construction Workers who are men, real Vehicle Drivers who are women, and real teenage Skateboarders for principal roles in a QT commercial! Details below:

Project: QuickTrip
NON-UNION
Casting Director: Vicky Boone, Chantel Italia
Audition date: Self tapes due 3/23
Callback Date: March 26, 2026 - virtual
Wardrobe Date: March 30, 2026
Shoot Dates: March 31 - April 3, 2026 (will work 1 day)
Rate of Pay: $750 +20%(session), $3000 + 20%(use), $100 +20%(fitting)
Location: Austin, TX. Must work local hire to ATX
Usage: Video and Print. All Media (all moving media + all print media). North America (US + CANADA + MEXICO). Exclusivity for C-Stores + QSRs 1 Year from first airdate.

—
WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

[REAL CONSTRUCTION WORKERS] 20-55 year old male, any ethnicity. Genuine and natural, not polished. Should feel like a friend, co-worker or neighbor. Expressive with a confident and grounded presence. Real construction workers or "blue-collar" workers encouraged to submit. OCP.

[REAL WOMEN WHO DRIVE FOR A LIVING] 25-45 year old woman, any ethnicity. Should be genuine and natural, not polished or “model-like.” Should feel like a friend, co-worker or neighbor. Expressive with a confident and grounded presence. Women who really drive for UPS, AMAZON, etc or other "blue-collar" workers encouraged to submit. OCP.

[SKATERS] 15-19 years old, male or female, any ethnicity. Must be a strong skateboarder. Genuine and natural, not polished or “model-like.” OCP.

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:
*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned (3/26, 3/30-4/3) or list conflicts
*FOR SKATER ONLY - Tell us a bit about your skateboarding experience.
*Please use the subject line "CONSTRUCTION WORKER" or "FEMALE DRIVER" or "SKATER" depending on which role you are submitting for.

We look forward to your submissions!
Team VBC

CASTING CALL – FEMALE LEAD (HORROR FEATURE) – NON-UNION 🎬  

Independent horror feature filming in Atlanta, GA is seeking a female lead - ASAP.

ROLE: MARY  
Female, early–mid 30s, thin build, height approx. 5’3”–5’6”.  
Seeking talent with light brown to medium brown skin tone and dark brunette to medium brown hair. 
Must be able to perform with a neutral American accent.

Production Details:  
📍 Location: Atlanta, Georgia  
📅 Shoot Dates: April 3-23, 2026 
💰 Compensation: PAID

Requirements:  
• NON-UNION ONLY (Must not be SAG-AFTRA)  
• Prior on-camera acting experience preferred but not required 
• Comfortable delivering a wide emotional range, including:  
 – Psychological tension and growing paranoia  
 – Portraying carrying deep trauma
 – Consumed by grief and obsession  
 – Controlled anger and emotional volatility
  
Submission Instructions:  
Please send headshot, full-body photo, resume, demo reel (if available), height, and current location to:  
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com
Subject Line: MARY – Female Lead Submission

Serious submissions only. We look forward to discovering powerful talent.

* Height between 5’0” and 5’5”

Casting Call for the [https://wssf.com/](https://wssf.com/) 72hr Film Maker Showdown. **Title:**72 film fest submission.

**Format:** Short Film

**Union:** Non-Union

**Location:** Whistler, BC 

**Production:** Created for the Whistler Ski and Snowboard Festival 72-Hour Filmmaker Showdown

**Shoot Dates:** March 27–28, 2026

**Compensation:** Volunteer / Copy & Credit

Transportation from Vancouver will be provided Friday and Saturday if needed.

**Production Note**

This project is being produced as part of a **72-hour film competition** and will be created on an accelerated schedule.

Our goal is to keep the shoot **organized, collaborative, and enjoyable**. While the timeline is tight, this will not be a "run-and-gun chaosproduction". The focus is on having fun, working together creatively, and ensuring everyone walks away with **a strong piece for their reel**, regardless of the competition’s final outcome.

Our team **won this event many years ago**, and we’re excited to return for the **30th anniversary** of the WSSF. 

*This note will be updated as roles are filled.*

⸻

**ROLES**

**DYLAN — LEAD**

Male, **25–55** ( flexible) 

Confident, intense, and charismatic. Dylan carries himself like someone completely certain of his place in the world and speaks with unwavering conviction.Charismatic, stubborn, and relentlessly self-assured.The character should be played with total sincerity — the humour comes from how seriously Dylan takes himself.Actor should be comfortable with subtle physical performance and strong deadpan delivery.

⸻
# **JOSEPH  — SUPPORTING (Role has been Cast)**

Male, **45–70** (flexible)

An eccentric intellectual type with a calm, thoughtful presence. Joseph speaks slowly and deliberately, often with philosophical weight behind his words.Dry, deadpan delivery and strong character instincts preferred.

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted with short audition sides for a self-tape. Feel free to reach out via email with any questions.

**Subject Line:**

[ROLE NAME] – [ACTOR NAME]

**Send submissions to:**

72hourfilm2026@gmail.com

**Submission Deadline:**

March 17th

items.text:
# **Casting Call for RED, proof of concept short**

Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept

This is a short excerpt of a longer film used as a proof of concept. The film consists of two scenes that hint at its larger themes. We are only producing the proof of concept as of now. 

Please send an email to **Red.film.2026@gmail.com**, with the subject line being "**Casting Submission - (Insert Character name)**", by **March 19th**. Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke

Writer: Zev Lemke

Producer: Samantha Teasdale

Casting Director: [Jacob Ellis](https://www.facebook.com/jacob.ellis.376695?__cft__[0]=AZboTo04r8L-ADFF47mM3TZop9TEVBanY09bd2p7DbkuE2nuKa8JJahubuiIUMeVdbjPTWfBOKucr8ci3zIGiDx14XRekgNqB6OnYTjBS6lzgRZWeWaE3vUil5DacY7S8Fo&__tn__=-]K-R)

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(10-14ish)

Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits.

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia

**Logline:**

In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing. 

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film.

**CHARACTERS:**

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him. 

Aiden (Supporting, 18-22, Plays 17) - average build. Aiden is extroverted, loud, and magnetic. Beneath her confident, brash exterior is a deep need to be seen and validated, which drives her to chase validation and engagement at all costs. Aiden can be superficial, often prioritizing image over real-life connections. She tends to treat Reid more as a ‘gay best friend’, an accessory, than as a person with his own needs and hesitations. 

Tracy (Supporting, 40s) – Greyish-brown hair, thin. A single mother who works long hours as a nurse, Tracy loves her son deeply but struggles to connect with him on an emotional level. Though she’s accepting of his sexuality and loves him unconditionally, it subtly shapes how she relates to him.  Reid’s self-expression often unsettles her, not due to any judgment, but from an anxiety of how the world might treat him. The mother and son were once close, but Tracy and Reid have drifted apart during his tumultuous teenage years. When Tracey comes home to find Reid on the floor she is terrified for her child.

items.text:
Teamwork makes the dream work.
I am starting a production company that will make films grounded in realism, depth and human nature.

I am looking for other passionate filmmakers who want to create something great. I am basing my model on everyone involved in the film has an equal share in it. Too many production companies prey on upcoming actors and crew, using them and keeping all the credit and profits to themselves. Getting enough of us together, we can say no thanks, we're making our own films as a team, with enough talented individuals putting in the time and work together, we can do great things and make great films. 

Looking for actors, DOPs, sound engineers, producers, editors, assistants and everything in-between who want to be involved in starting this production company together. 

Let's build something amazing and make some great films.

WARSZAWA 25 i 26.03.2026r.

film fabularny

Do filmu fabularnego o początkach kariery Adama Małysza poszukuję Statystów (Panowie i Panie) w wieku 20-50 lat, którzy chcieliby przeżyć przygodę na planie i wcielić się w role takie laboranci, sportowcy czy goście hotelowi. 

Stawka - 120 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: A25 lub A26 (w zależności od wybranego dnia)
Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki z dnia zgłoszenia.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – UNPAID SHORT FILM “GETHSEMANE”

Hello all!

I’m a Year 2 Film student from Arts University Plymouth, currently casting for a 5-minute experimental psychological short film about a man trapped in a pressure chamber who must choose between clinging to a haunting love or sacrificing a part of himself to survive.

This is a minimal-dialogue, visually driven film relying on physical performance, symbolic movement, and emotional expression.

📍 Location: Arts University Plymouth

📅 Shoot Dates: 1 April 2026

If you’re interested, please email or DM me with:

• Name

• Age

• Headshot/photo

• Any acting experience (not required)

Student actors and newcomers are very welcome.

Thank you!

items.text:
**🎭 LOOKING FOR – Moulin Rouge Character: Harold Zidler (London, June 17th)**

Hi everyone,

 I’m looking for a strong character performer to bring the role of **Harold Zidler** to life for a **corporate Moulin Rouge themed event** taking place in **London - June 17th**.

We’re looking for someone with:

• Strong **stage presence and charisma**
• Confident **character acting ability**
• The ability to engage and interact with guests (meet & greet style)
• A bold, theatrical energy in line with the Moulin Rouge world
• Ideally able to **provide their own costume** (or elements of the look) in keeping with the character

Your rate for Meet and great/Host

**Reference:** Please see the YouTube clip (from **1:08 onwards**) for the style and essence of the character. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bhKj9FosGx0](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bhKj9FosGx0)

If this feels like a great fit for you or you know someone who would be perfect for this role 

Please send a **DM** or Comment below

Thanks so much!

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

topComments.text:
I would love to know more!

My Instagram is harrywiginton_

items.text:
# CASTING CALL – STUDENT GRADUATION FILM

Project Title: *Sanctuary*
Production: Graduation short film for Wiltshire College & University Centre

Logline:
A quiet young woman struggling with isolation in her daily life encounters a small moment of creativity that sparks a sense of reflection and possibility.

Style & Inspiration:
The project is a 5–10 minute experimental short film exploring themes of nostalgia, growing up, and the quiet emotional moments of adulthood. The film is inspired by the visual and tonal style of All About Lily Chou-Chou and Chungking Express.

## ROLES

**LUNA (Lead)**
Female
Age: 18–29
All ethnicities welcome

Description:
A quiet and introspective young woman navigating feelings of loneliness and emotional distance in her everyday life. Much of the performance will rely on subtle expression and physical acting rather than dialogue.

Key Scenes:
• Workplace isolation among coworkers
• A reflective journey on public transport
• A late-night walk leading to a mysterious discovery

Notes:
Comfortable performing subtle, introspective moments with minimal dialogue.

_______________________

**ANGEL (Supporting)**
Female
Age: 18–29
All ethnicities welcome

Description:
A supporting presence connected to Luna’s emotional journey. The role helps shape the tone and emotional contrast within the story.

EXPERIENCE

Actors of **any experience level are welcome to apply**. This project is open to students, emerging actors, and performers building their showreel.

SHOOT DETAILS

Location:
Filming will take place across locations between Salisbury and Bournemouth, with most scenes shot around Salisbury.

Shoot Dates:
Expected shooting window:
Week of 23rd March – 29th March 2026
Plus one/two additional shoot day(s) in April 2026 (exact date to be confirmed).

**COMPENSATION**

These roles are unpaid. However, the production will provide:

• Food during shoot days
• Travel reimbursement
• Accommodation if required
• Showreel footage from the finished film

**TO APPLY**

Please apply through Mandy (linked below):

• Headshot
• Acting CV (if available)
• Showreel (if available)

Subject line:
“Sanctuary Casting – [Role Name]”

Submission deadline: 21st March

Selected applicants may be asked to submit a short self-tape or attend a brief audition.

Director / Production Team: Joanna Kucharska/Adam Carr/David Glukh
Final year student filmmakers at Wiltshire College & University Centre as part of Bournemouth University, creating a graduation short film.

[[https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/](https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/)](https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/)

items.text:
**GENERAL AUDITIONS – The Bronx, NY**

Are you an actor with a passion for history? Come join us for an upcoming Live History performance in The Bronx, New York. We’re seeking local actors for a theatrical experience.

Interested? Read our casting call below!

Live History is an international theater company that specializes in interactive, site-specific performances in historic buildings, often incorporating elements of an escape room–style experience. 

This particular production features a **historical/classic script originally written in the 1700s**. Actors should be comfortable working with period language and classical text.

**Role Available: UNDERSTUDY**

**Age: 21+**

**Gender: Any**

We are casting the role of **UNDERSTUDY**.

The Understudy will:
* Cover up to **five (5) roles** in the show.
* Read for absent actors during rehearsals.
* Be prepared to move into any assigned role in the event of illness on the day of the performance.
* Potentially be used as a silent on-stage character during the show, if desired.

This is an excellent opportunity for a versatile and prepared performer who is comfortable tracking multiple roles and stepping in with confidence.

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid **$200 total as an honorarium **for one performance and all online/Zoom rehearsals.

**Show Date**

**March 22, 2026**
IN PERSON – Bronx, NY
**Rehearsals**

Rehearsals will take place primarily over Zoom with the last few in person:
* Zoom rehearsals are **one hour each**, held **3–4 times per week**.
* Most rehearsals occur during **daytime hours**.
* Some exceptions for existing conflicts may be accommodated, provided the actor can attend the majority of rehearsals.
**MANDATORY ZOOM Dress Rehearsal**

March 20 (Friday) | 7:00–9:00 PM EST
**MANDATORY IN-PERSON Dress Rehearsals**

March 21
March 22 (prior to the 2:00 PM showtime)

Attendance at all dress rehearsals  and in person show is required.

**Auditions**

Auditions will be held virtually (via Zoom) on:

Wednesday, March 4th | 1:00 PM – 6:00 PM EST

Auditions will consist of a scripted cold read.

**To Request an Audition**

Please submit a resume and headshot to:
[livehistoryusa@gmail.com](https://)

Subject line:
**THE BRONX AUDITIONS**

Actors must be 21+ and have a professional resume and headshot to be considered.

For more information, visit:
[www.livehistoryshows.com](https://www.livehistoryshows.com)

CASTING | THAILAND
We are looking for 3 actors, a man around 40 years old, who are native speakers of Spanish, Portuguese, or Italian, with clear, fluent speech and no noticeable accent.

Details:

• Fee: $2600

• Location: Thailand

• 1 shooting day

• Own wardrobe required

• The footage cannot be used in a personal portfolio

• Shooting dates: March

• Flights will be covered by the production

To apply, please send your photos.

Selected candidates will be asked to record and submit a video test. We look forward to your applications ✨

items.text:
🎬 CASTING NOTICE – STUDENT SHORT FILM

Title: Incoherent
Project Type: Junior Thesis Project – Loyola Marymount University
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Director: Royce Haddock
Producers: Ava Correia, Walter Bridgewater
Shoot Dates: 3-Day Shoot (Friday,  March 20 / Saturday, March 21/ Sunday, March 22)
Location: Los Angeles/ Ladera Heights, CA
Compensation: $100/day (3 days total) + Meals & Credit

🎥 PROJECT OVERVIEW
Incoherent is a psychological thriller/drama centered on grief, memory, and the fractured relationship between a father and his daughter.
Abel, a grieving father, is trapped in a recurring nightmare that forces him to relive the day he lost one of his daughters. On the eve of the 10-year anniversary, the nightmare changes—he can no longer wake up. As he searches for answers within this psychological loop, a real-life emergency unfolds, putting his surviving daughter in danger.
At its core, this is a story about a man learning how to live again after unimaginable loss—and a father and daughter struggling to reconnect after years of emotional distance.

🎭 CASTING ROLE
ABEL (Lead)
Gender: Male
Ethnicity: Black / African American
Age Range: Late 30s – 40s
Role Type: Lead
Shoot Requirement: Must be available all 3 shoot days
Character Description:
Selfless, steadfast, and emotionally guarded. Abel is a devoted single father who once had two daughters, but after the tragic loss of one at a young age, he has become emotionally withdrawn.
Ten years later, he remains psychologically stuck in that moment—avoiding anything that reminds him of the loss. His unresolved grief prevents him from being fully present in the life of his surviving daughter, now 18, creating a quiet but painful emotional distance between them.
Throughout the film, Abel is forced to confront the truth he’s been running from, making this role heavily performance-driven with strong emotional depth.
Additional Notes:
Facial hair preferred
Must be comfortable portraying intense emotional scenes (grief, distress, vulnerability)
Strong dramatic acting ability required

📩 SUBMISSION DETAILS
Headshot • Resume • Demo Reel (if available)
Must confirm availability for all shoot dates
Submit To: IncoherentShortFilm@gmail.com
Subject Line: INCOHERENT – ABEL SUBMISSION – [Your Name]

**Looking for an experienced 1st AC (ARRI Mini) + DMT**
**Low-budget independent short film**
**Location:** Toronto
**Shoot Dates:** March 20 & March 22

We are currently looking for:

**1. 1st AC**
* Must have solid experience working with **ARRI Mini**
* Indie set experience preferred
* Cantonese speaking is a big plus

**2. DMT**
* Needed for **March 20 & March 22**
* Experience preferred

This is a **low-budget project**, so please understand the rate will be modest. We are hoping to find reliable and experienced crew who are open to supporting an independent film.

If interested, please send your experience / resume / availability.
Thank you!

zoeyfilm77@gmail.com

items.text:
Are you an indie filmmaker looking to participate in a unique competition? Step into Room 237 at the International Horror Hotel Film Festival, where you’ll have just a few weeks to create a 5-minute horror short built around your assigned murder weapons, with cash prizes, medals, and more on the line. Registration is only 50 USD per film, open worldwide, and capped at 36 entries—once the doors to Room 237 slam shut, that’s it. Grab your team, lock in your spot today, and get all the details and signup info on the International Horror Hotel website.

https://tinyurl.com/249kekh5

items.text:
Submit your film to our brand new film fest! 🎥🎬
Filmmakers...this is your sign. Stop waiting for "the right time". Put your film where it belongs — on the big screen. 🎬 Submissions are now open! [https://filmfreeway.com/DaretoDreamFilmFestival](https://filmfreeway.com/DaretoDreamFilmFestival) 

Most film festivals want your money. Very few actually care about your growth. Dare to Dream Film Festival was built by filmmakers who were tired of submitting, getting rejected, and hearing nothing back. Our mission is to celebrate underrepresented independent filmmakers who made films without connections, a trust fund, or studio backing. 

So we’re doing it differently:
– Every submission gets constructive feedback from industry professionals
– Winners will receive camera equipment or professional film classes or and industry-standard software
– A dedicated networking night for official selections both in-person and virtual for you to build professional connections

Can't wait to see your films! #filmindustry #Filmmaking

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'STATISTER SOGES I forbindelse med optagelserne til en ny, dansk spillefilm seger Ηy Hyane Film statister (18+) af alle ken/type der kan spille bodegagaster. Dato: Onsdag Lokation: Indre Kobenhavn Tidsrum: 09.00-13.0 Som tak for din medvirken vil du modtage en biografbillet, og vi vil selv selvfelgelig gore vores bedste for at skabe en god og spzendende oplevelse pả settet! Vil du vaere med? Send en mail til statista atist@hyaenefilm.dk, og vedheft et vellignende foto + -fulde navn, alder, telefonnummer og e-mail. Du bedes skrive folgende emnefeltet: "BODEGA" Vi glzeder Os meget til at hore fra dig!'

items.text:
TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND 

Vi får mange henvendelser, men mangler lige de sidste på plads, der er et match med hår og tøjstr. Se nedenfor.

5 MANDLIGE statistroller som funktionær, alder ca. 25 - 50 år
1 KVINDELIG statistrolle som servitrice/kollega til birolle, 
alder ca. 20-30 år

Du skal kunne komme til Handest mandag 16/3 kl. 9.00 - ca. kl. 11 til en kostume/sminkeprøve, så kostume og hår er klar til optagelse.

Du skal senere på dagen kunne være med til optagelse 
16/3 ca. 15 - 02 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i en togvogn både holdende og kørende.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage + 1 sminke/kostumeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-M, ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne lave sideskilning med mindre naturlig skaldet, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage. Du skal kunne se uden briller, da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

KVINDE:
max højde 175, tøjstr. XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Du skal kunne komme til Handest mandag 16/3 kl. 9.00 - ca. kl. 11 til en kostume/sminkeprøve, så kostume og hår er klar til optagelse.

Du skal senere på dagen kunne være med til optagelse 
16/3 ca. 15 - 02 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i en togvogn både holdende og kørende.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage + 1 sminke/kostumeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-M, ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne lave sideskilning med mindre naturlig skaldet, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage. Du skal kunne se uden briller, da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

KVINDE:
max højde 175, tøjstr. XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

items.text:
**“MAX” CASTING CALL – SASKIA**

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of SASKIA in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE “SASKIA” FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

21 – 30 years old.

Female-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Wednesday 18th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Sunday 22nd March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.
